title: Baharly Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Baharly, with a Z-Score of +3.14. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Baharly is causing extreme temperatures, with a CDD of 10.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 40%, with moderate winds of 16.6 km/h. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high, indicating a high energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
